mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP_ANNUAL_LV ( ANNUAL_NO, EMP_NO, BASE_YR, TOT_ANNUAL_LV, USED_ANNUAL_LV, REM_ANNUAL_LV, SICK_LV, OFFICIAL_LV, REWARD_LV ) VALUES ( SEQ_ANNUAL_NO.NEXTVAL, #{empNo}, #{baseYr}, 0, #{usedAnnualLv}, (NVL(#{rewardLv},0) - (NVL(#{usedAnnualLv},0) + NVL(#{sickLv},0))), #{sickLv}, #{officialLv}, #{rewardLv} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP_ANNUAL_LV SET USED_ANNUAL_LV = #{usedAnnualLv}, SICK_LV = #{sickLv}, OFFICIAL_LV = #{officialLv}, REWARD_LV = #{rewardLv}, -- 실시간 잔여 연차 계산 반영 (총(기본) + 포상) - (사용 + 병가) = 남은 연차 REM_ANNUAL_LV = (TOT_ANNUAL_LV + #{rewardLv}) - (#{usedAnnualLv} + #{sickLv}) WHERE ANNUAL_NO = #{annualNo}
